sourceEvidence.detail: item_definitions is the central Roseau source for definition id, sprite, colour, size, height, dataclass, behavior flags, name, and description.
Roseau behavior flags define floor, wall, sit, lay, stack, decoration, post-it, teleporter, dice, trophy, and interaction meanings.
Purchases create inventory from catalogue call_id and definition_id. Deals can include extraData that must survive into inventory.
Preview and render asset candidates are resolved from extracted source bitmap member names and generated PNG paths.

adminEditing.sourceOfTruth: generated/runtime-data/release1_roseau_dcr0910-furni.json is generated from Roseau and extracted assets. public/habbo-config/furni/release1.json is the editable copy for future runtime override loading. Keep ids and call IDs aligned with the active server database.
